# NextClaw

Homepage: https://nextclaw.io/
Documentation: https://docs.nextclaw.io/
Repository: https://github.com/Peiiii/nextclaw
NPM Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nextclaw

Summary:
NextClaw is a local AI workbench and personal operating layer for agents, model providers, message channels, skills, files, automations, and desktop tools.
It helps users start from a task, bring in the right capabilities, and keep work moving inside one workspace.

Primary pages:
- English homepage: https://nextclaw.io/en/
- Chinese homepage: https://nextclaw.io/zh/
- English use cases: https://nextclaw.io/en/use-cases/
- Chinese use cases: https://nextclaw.io/zh/use-cases/
- English integrations: https://nextclaw.io/en/integrations/
- Chinese integrations: https://nextclaw.io/zh/integrations/
- English product updates: https://nextclaw.io/en/releases/
- Chinese product updates: https://nextclaw.io/zh/releases/
- English desktop downloads: https://nextclaw.io/en/download/
- Chinese desktop downloads: https://nextclaw.io/zh/download/
- English install options: https://nextclaw.io/en/install/
- Chinese install options: https://nextclaw.io/zh/install/

Key capabilities:
- Local AI workbench for continuing tasks across conversations, files, panels, and tools.
- Agents with separate roles, memory, skills, and workspaces.
- Model providers and custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
- Message channels including Weixin, Feishu/Lark, QQ, DingTalk, WeCom, Telegram, Discord, Slack, email, and WhatsApp.
- Skills, MCP, CLI tools, scheduled work, local files, panel apps, file previews, HTML previews, and image generation.

Last updated: 2026-07-09
